optimization_goals: Zero per-frame GC allocations for event processing
Frame-safe dispatch (no Unity API calls from non-main thread)

buffer_pooling.description: Reuse byte arrays for WebSocket message read/write to avoid GC pressure

event_object_pooling.description: Pre-allocate event wrapper objects to avoid per-event heap allocation

string_interning.description: Intern frequently used event names and namespace strings

inbound_pipeline: 1. WebSocket thread receives raw message bytes
2. Deserialize to SocketEvent struct (off main thread, using pooled buffer)
4. Main thread drains queue during Update() — max N events per frame
event_buffering_and_dispatch.overflow_policy: If queue exceeds 256 items, drop oldest non-critical events (typing indicators first)
event_buffering_and_dispatch.dispatch_order: Critical events processed first, then normal, then low within frame budget

multiplayer_chat_overlay.description: Overlay chat UI rendered as Unity UI Canvas, updated from dispatched events
guidance: State mutations ONLY on main thread via dispatched events
Use observer pattern (C# events/delegates) for UI binding

conflict_resolution.sequence_gap_handling: Request reconciliation from server for gaps > 1
conflict_resolution.duplicate_detection: client_event_id deduplication set (max 1000 entries, LRU eviction)

transitions.paused → unauthenticated: On OnApplicationFocus(true) with expired token (refresh failed)

test_scenarios.name: high_frequency_event_stream
test_scenarios.acceptance: No frame drops below 30 FPS, no GC spike > 1ms

test_scenarios.name: background_resume
test_scenarios.acceptance: Socket reconnects within 3 seconds, no duplicate events, state consistent

test_scenarios.name: network_flap
test_scenarios.description: Network toggles every 5 seconds for 2 minutes
test_scenarios.acceptance: State transitions are deterministic, no crash, offline queue preserved
